description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, modular design with a combination of dark wood and sleek, glossy surfaces. The front section includes a large refrigerator on the left, a built-in oven, a microwave, and a cooktop, all integrated into the cabinetry. The upper cabinets have a white finish, while the lower cabinets and side panels are a rich, dark wood. The countertop is black and appears to be made of a solid, polished material, providing a clean workspace. The unit is designed for maximum storage and functionality, with multiple doors and drawers for organization. The overall appearance is contemporary and suitable for upscale urban environments such as apartment kitchens or communal spaces.
description: A modern, modular kitchen cabinetry unit with dark wood panels, white upper cabinets, and integrated appliances. Features a black countertop and multiple storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all integrated appliances, white upper cabinets, dark wood lower cabinets, and a black countertop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and thickness of the cabinetry, with dark wood paneling visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain back panel, mostly dark wood with a section of metallic finish from the refrigerator.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabinetry's profile and the continuation of the dark wood finish.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen wall and base cabinet set
